prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the front-center dancer into a more dynamic, cinematic Awa Odori festival scene at night. Keep the same pink kimono, amigasa hat, and overall festival identity, but push the pose into active mid-dance motion with one leg stepping forward, the skirt and sleeves swirling, and both arms raised expressively. Recompose the image into a tighter, lower-angle street-level shot centered on the lead dancer, with additional dancers in matching formation behind her for depth and movement. Change the setting from the wide parade crowd to a lantern-lit festival street with warm glowing paper lanterns, illuminated stalls, and visible vertical signage including Japanese text reading "阿波おどり". Emphasize motion, energy, and warm nighttime atmosphere, with vivid lighting, shallow depth of field, and a polished photoreal festival look.
